attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT OQ.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER OQ
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_QTR_QUOTE_GOODS_PRODUCTS QGP
ON QGP.BK_QUOTE_NUM = OQ.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM
WHERE QUOTE_LINE_COUNT =1 AND 1=2
/*OR  ( QUOTE_LINE_COUNT>1 AND ( SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT <> 0 OR DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT<>0 ) )*/
GROUP BY 1

SELECT  
BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, 
INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SRVC_BKGS_TSS  BOK  
INNER JOIN  
	( 
	SELECT NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ,  
	MAX(BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM) BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM 
	FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  NSOLVT  
	WHERE  BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM  IS NOT NULL  
	AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  
	GROUP BY NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT               
	HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM) = 1  
	)  INNER_NSOLVT 
ON (INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) 
WHERE  BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT <> - 9999  
GROUP BY BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, 
INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM

SELECT 
BK_QUOTE_NUM,
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT,
DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT,
TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT,
TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT,
QUOTE_LINE_COUNT,
CASE 
WHEN QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.QUOTE_LINE_COUNT=1 THEN 1
WHEN QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT <>0 THEN SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT / TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT
ELSE
CASE WHEN TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT=0 THEN  0 ELSE  DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT /TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT END  END RATIO
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_QUOTE_GOODS_PRODUCTS QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO WHERE 1=2

SELECT 
INNER_SQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM 
,INNER_SQ.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
,INNER_SQ.SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT  
,INNER_SQ.DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT          DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT           
,SUM(INNER_SQ.SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT)  OVER (  PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM  )  TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT 
,SUM(INNER_SQ.DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT)  OVER (  PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM  )  TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT 
,COUNT(1)  OVER (  PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM  )  QUOTE_LINE_COUNT  
FROM 
( 
			SELECT  
			BK_QUOTE_NUM  BK_QUOTE_NUM 
			,IB.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
			,SUM(SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT)  SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT 
			,SUM(INNER_SQ.DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT)          DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT           
			FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE  INNER_SQ 
			INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_QTR_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER INNER_NSOLVT1 
			ON(INNER_NSOLVT1.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM=INNER_SQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM ) 
			INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_INSTALLED_PRODUCT IB ON(INNER_SQ.IP_KEY = IB.IP_KEY ) 
			WHERE INNER_SQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM <> 'UNKNOWN' AND 1=2   
			AND INNER_SQ.SQ_LN_STATUS_CD IN ('Quote Converted','CONVERTED') 
			AND INNER_SQ.IP_KEY > 0    
			AND  IB.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY NOT IN (SELECT NOT_MAPPED_ITEM_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_NOT_MAPPED_PRODUCTS  )   
GROUP BY BK_QUOTE_NUM   
			,IB.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  
) INNER_SQ

SELECT 
SOLTV.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SRVC_BKGS_TSS NBM
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
GROUP BY 1

SELECT 
QL.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
QL.RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
RPQL.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
IP.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
SUM( DV_SQ_LN_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT)  DV_SQ_LN_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
SUM( DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT     )  DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT 
FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE QL 
INNER JOIN $$IBVWDB.N_INSTALLED_PRODUCT IP ON IP.IP_KEY = QL.IP_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RPQL ON RPQL.ITEM_KEY = QL.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY 
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_QTR_BKGS_QUOTES BQ ON BQ.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM = QL.BK_QUOTE_NUM 
WHERE DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT <> 0 AND IP.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY>0 
AND QL.SQ_LN_STATUS_CD IN ('Quote Converted','CONVERTED')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4

SELECT
BK_QUOTE_NUM,
RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_SQ_LN_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM,RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID ) SQ_SC_SS_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM ) SQ_SC_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID ) SQ_SS_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM) SQ_AMT ,
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_SC_SS_AMT SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO , 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_SC_AMT SQ_SC_GP_RATIO , 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_SS_AMT SQ_SS_GP_RATIO , 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_AMT SQ_GP_RATIO 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SQ_SC_SS_GP_AMT
WHERE DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT <> 0
